summary: Iteration 5 frontend-only verification complete. All Iteration 5 requirements (palette, typography, layout, headers, skills-matrix progress bars, quick pills, left sidebar active-file cyan border, terminal inset bg) verified on https://sre-agent.preview.emergentagent.com. All regression slash commands work (/help, /summary, /recruiter, /skills, /timeline, /github, /interview, /gaps, /why-hire, /contact, /labs, /projects, /runbooks, /resume, /simulate-outage, /clear). Suggestion (/projcts -> /projects), Tab autocomplete (/pro -> /projects), /resume download button, /simulate-outage CrashLoopBackOff streaming all functional.

verified_iteration_5_checks.global_typography_jetbrains_mono: PASS - body font-family resolves to 'JetBrains Mono', line-height 1.5 (24px)
verified_iteration_5_checks.terminal_inset_bg_040608: PASS - [data-testid=terminal] rgb(4,6,8); main wrapper bg rgb(4,6,8) with slate border-x rgb(31,36,46)
verified_iteration_5_checks.cyan_accent_00f5d4: PASS - active file left-border rgb(0,245,212), pill hover ring cyan, /help span cyan
verified_iteration_5_checks.neon_green_10b981: PASS - SYSTEM: ACTIVE text rgb(16,185,129); counters (projects/runbooks/labs/github repos) green
verified_iteration_5_checks.skills_matrix_progress_bars: PASS - bar-container-ops-k8s-docker (90%), bar-iac-cloud-aws-terraform (80%), bar-automation-python-bash-ci-cd (85%), bar-observability-prometheus-grafana (80%) all rendered with 3px height filled bars
verified_iteration_5_checks.quick_pills_labels: PASS - pill-resume 'View Resume', pill-projects 'Core Projects', pill-runbooks 'SRE Runbooks', pill-simulate-outage 'Simulate Outage'; all four rounded-full pills clickable and invoke correct command
verified_iteration_5_checks.modern_lucide_icons: PASS - FileCode2/Folder/FolderOpen/ChevronRight/ChevronDown imported from lucide-react and rendered
verified_iteration_5_checks.column_headers: PASS - left 'Infrastructure Repository', center 'Live SRE Terminal (type /help)', right 'System Metrics & Candidate Profile'
verified_iteration_5_checks.system_active_pulsing_green_dot: PASS - .animate-ping wrapper + #10b981 dot present, text rgb(16,185,129)

regression_checks.slash_commands: PASS - /help, /summary, /recruiter, /why-this-candidate (via pill check), /resume, /projects, /runbooks, /labs, /skills, /timeline, /github, /interview, /gaps, /why-hire, /contact, /clear, /simulate-outage all executed and produced output
regression_checks.simulate_outage_streaming: PASS - CrashLoopBackOff incident text streamed into terminal

critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. Code is clean, well-componentised, palette tokens consistent. (Optional) Consider extracting the small inline hex literals (#00f5d4, #10b981, #1f242e, #040608) into a single shared constants module / CSS variables to avoid drift across components in future iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 palette + layout overhaul verified end-to-end. New skills-matrix testids use single-dash slugs (e.g. bar-container-ops-k8s-docker). All previous iteration regressions still green. App is on https://sre-agent.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
